question: Nut‑free dessert options

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any dessert options on the menu today. How about burgers, chicken, or fries?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a nut-free dessert—can I get burgers, chicken, or fries instead?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any nut-free dessert options on the menu today. We also don't have burgers, chicken, or fries right now—those aren't available in our current selection. How about the Mango Pineapple Smoothie? It's nut-free (no nuts listed in its allergens) and can be considered a dessert option if you're looking for something sweet. Let me know if that works for you!

final_cashier_response: We don't have any nut-free dessert options on the menu today. We also don't have burgers, chicken, or fries right now—those aren't available in our current selection. How about the Mango Pineapple Smoothie? It's nut-free (no nuts listed in its allergens) and can be considered a dessert option if you're looking for something sweet. Let me know if that works for you!
